description:
Goal: Compiler2 should derive raw integer callable-entry return lanes for the settled Enum.reduce user reducer path.

Signal:
- cargo test --lib compiler2_abi_ready_derives_only_the_closed_enum_reduce_callable_entries -- --nocapture passes
- cargo test --lib compiler2_emission_ready_includes_the_required_enum_reduce_callable_entries -- --nocapture passes

Why:
- fixing fz-rh2.8.2.6 unblocked the Enum.reduce semantic path far enough to expose a backend-contract precision bug: the user reducer callable entry now resolves, but its return ABI is still ValueRef instead of RawInt.
- this is a real artifact-contract issue, not telemetry noise or a test harness artifact.
title: Compiler2 artifacts: recover raw integer callable-entry lanes for Enum.reduce
